] Sup gamers, I’m Traz. You either know:
] Sup gamers, I’m Traz. You either know me or you don’t, but it’s  alright either way. What could I do for you? 
 Click on an option below to ask me a question.
Super. Do you need help finding somethin: Super. Do you need help finding something?
Super! What's going on out there?: Super! What's going on out there?
)] Super, for what purpose do humans liv: )] Super, for what purpose do humans live? They live to attain peace of mind by conquering their fears and anxieties. Seeking fame, controlling others, and acquiring wealth are methods by which they attain peace of mind. Some even chose to attain peace of mind through friendships or marriage. When humans express willingness to help others, or proclaim their actions to be in the name of love or peace, their true motive is really to attain peace of mind. Attaining peace of mind is the true goal of all mankind. So tell me, now that I have enlightened you, why do you still feel anxiety in serving me? This is the simplest path to attaining peace of mind. Doesn't the thought of challenging me, knowing it may bring about your demise, give you anxiety?

Uh, well, it gives people powers.

Henry died when he used it—: Henry died when he used it—
The interesting thing about Elementium i: The interesting thing about Elementium is that it doesn't technically "give you powers."
The substance restructures molecular bon: The substance restructures molecular bonds within your cells.
Forcing them into more efficient arrange: Forcing them into more efficient arrangements.
Proteins align. Energy pathways accelera: Proteins align. Energy pathways accelerate. Nothing is wasted.
Your heart begins beating far faster tha: Your heart begins beating far faster than normal.
Muscles recruit 100% of their fibers, fa: Muscles recruit 100% of their fibers, far beyond what the brain would normally allow.
Your senses sharpen as neural signals ac: Your senses sharpen as neural signals accelerate.
Adrenaline, dopamine, and cortisol flood: Adrenaline, dopamine, and cortisol flood the brain, amplifying every thought and emotion.
Uh... am I supposed to know what those w: Uh... am I supposed to know what those words mean?
Your heart beats faster, muscles get big: Your heart beats faster, muscles get bigger, brain gets smarter.
But your heart strains against the press: But your heart strains against the pressure.
You could also throw a punch and break y: You could also throw a punch and break your entire arm without even realizing it.
And it amplifies your personality. If yo: And it amplifies your personality. If you're angry, you would become more angry.
Finally, one more thing: your vision is: Finally, one more thing: your vision is enhanced.
To the point where you can see visions f: To the point where you can see visions from the future.
Oh yeah—when I used Elementium, I saw yo: Oh yeah—when I used Elementium, I saw you there...
It was staring right at me.
I felt like it was looking through me.
Elementium can be poison. It will show t: Elementium can be poison. It will show things you don't want to see.
That's why I want to make sure: are you: That's why I want to make sure: are you sure you want to do this?
If that's the price, then I'll pay it.
Whatever it takes to reach the top…: Whatever it takes to reach the top…
